uplink.description: All sensors: battery, PM mass + number concentrations, air temperature/humidity, barometric pressure
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (Decentlab protocol v2, flags=0b1111). Expected values derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js, then applying this codec's unit conversions (Pa->hPa, /1000 V) and sensor-resolution rounding. Pressure 1013.26 hPa is atmospheric.

uplink.description: Air temperature, humidity and barometric pressure only (weather-station requires)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (flags=0b1100, only temp/humidity + pressure blocks). Expected derived via reference/upstream-codec.js + this codec's Pa->hPa conversion. Pressure 980 hPa is atmospheric.
Synthetic in-bounds payload (flags=0b0001, battery block only). Expected derived via reference/upstream-codec.js: battery word 3105 / 1000 = 3.105 V.
Synthetic error case: version byte 3 instead of 2. Matches reference/upstream-codec.js error string.
